originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__time_8' during its initialization is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'time' during its initialization is never read
reasoning: time is initialized at L14 and immediately read at L15 as the first argument of lcd_setstatus(time, true). Dead store alarm is a false positive. The VBDB bug (// ERROR at L15) is the argument count mismatch: when ULTRA_LCD=F, lcd_setstatus takes one parameter but is called with two, which is undefined behavior in C. That is a different alarm type at a different conceptual level.
